notes: Source candidates for real or near-real waste-room governance event testing. Items marked training_ready=true have labels that can be used directly after format conversion. Items marked review_required=true need manual filtering or relabeling before training.

sources.name: UniqueData/outdoor_garbage
sources.use: Current demo training source for image-level full/empty/scattered status.

sources.name: TACO Trash Annotations in Context
sources.use: Seed data for litter/small-object detection; needs filtering for fixed-point waste-room resemblance.

sources.name: keremberke/garbage-object-detection
sources.use: Large generic garbage object detection source; useful for pretraining, not sufficient for governance events by itself.

sources.name: alexNova/MRS-Trash-Detection
sources.use: YOLO-format trash detection candidate; needs class and scene filtering.

sources.name: Dataset of Stagnant Water and Wet Surface with Annotations
sources.license_status: CC BY 4.0 on Mendeley Data page
sources.use: Negative and boundary cases for ground dirt: wet floor, puddle, reflection, rain-after effects.

sources.name: Wet Floor Detection V1
sources.use: Candidate for wet/reflection false-positive cases if export access is available.

sources.name: Littering dataset by thesis
sources.use: Candidate source for person-trash interaction and illegal drop behavior.

sources.name: Semarang PantauSemar fixed-point waste site
sources.use: Current demo fixed-camera visual reference; good for input-shape validation.
